user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the HUD (score, lives, bombs, chain) disappears. The user wants the HUD to remain visible during pause.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Add `renderHUD(p)` call to the PAUSED game phase case, so the HUD remains visible when paused while the game logic remains frozen.
